page.content: In Table 1, the groups are categorized with respective total cholesterol (mg/100 ml) and triglycerides (mg/100 ml) values: Control saline 10 ml/kg; i.p. (n = 6) shows 58.26 ± 2.83 for total cholesterol and 55.21 ± 4.72 for triglycerides; Tyloxapol 500 mg/kg; i.p. (n = 6) has total cholesterol at 621.3 ± 24.82 and triglycerides at 5134 ± 451.8; Tyloxapol 500 mg/kg; i.p. + Atorvastatin 10 mg/kg (n = 6) presents total cholesterol of 368.2 ± 58.85 and triglycerides of 3100 ± 297.0; Tyloxapol 500 mg/kg; i.p. + Vo.Cr 150 mg/kg (n = 6) reports total cholesterol at 495.3 ± 18.82 and triglycerides at 3841 ± 599.4; Tyloxapol 500 mg/kg; i.p. + Vo.Cr 300 mg/kg (n = 6) indicates total cholesterol of 405.1 ± 50.33 and triglycerides of 3068 ± 218.8; Tyloxapol 500 mg/kg; i.p. + Vo.Cr 600 mg/kg (n = 6) lists total cholesterol at 351.9 ± 23.21 and triglycerides at 2985 ± 232.1. In Table 2, PM2.5 days before clinical measurement includes Lag 0 with FMD at −17.3 (−34.6 to 0.0)*, NTGMD at 2.5 (−9.0 to 13.9), LAEI at 0.4 (−4.2 to 5.0), SAEI at −3.0 (−13.0 to 7.0), SVR at −1.6 (−3.7 to 0.4); Lag 1 has FMD at −4.4 (−24.6 to 15.8), NTGMD at −13.6 (−24.5 to −2.6)*, LAEI at −0.3 (−6.0 to 5.4), SAEI at −17.0 (−27.5 to −6.4)**, SVR at 1.6 (−0.9 to 4.1); Lag 2 shows FMD at −18.6 (−44.8 to 7.6), NTGMD at −10.2 (−23.5 to 3.0), LAEI at 2.5 (−4.3 to 9.4), SAEI at −9.7 (−23.5 to 4.2), SVR at 3.5 (0.5 to 6.5)*; Lag 3 presents FMD at 1.6 (−23.6 to 26.9), NTGMD at −8.0 (−22.4 to 6.4), LAEI at −7.3 (−13.5 to −1.1)*, SAEI at −15.1 (−29.3 to −0.9)*, SVR at 2.4 (−0.5 to 5.3); Lag 4 indicates FMD at 18.4 (−3.5 to 40.3), NTGMD at 3.6 (−7.9 to 15.0), LAEI at −2.3 (−8.0 to 3.3), SAEI at −2.1 (−14.0 to 9.7), SVR at 3.2 (0.7 to 5.6)*; the Five-day average shows FMD at −19.4 (−62.6 to 23.8), NTGMD at −19.4 (−44.3 to 5.5), LAEI at −4.6 (−15.3 to 6.1), SAEI at −25.4 (−45.4 to −5.3)*, SVR at 4.5 (−0.3 to 9.2).
